node.data: {"V1294":{"lit":"անխոստովանանք","line":{"facs":"#z104423305","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104423305","n":"17"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9090"},"n":"անխոստովանանք"},"M695":{"lit":"ան<lb xml:id=\"l103912308\" facs=\"#z103912308\" n=\"15\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>խոստովանանք","line":{"facs":"#z103912307","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103912307","n":"14"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-283a"},"n":"անխոստովանանք"},"M892":{"lit":"անխոստովան<lb xml:id=\"l104346133\" facs=\"#z104346133\" n=\"3\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>անք","line":{"facs":"#z104346132","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104346132","n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"892-187b"},"n":"անխոստովանանք"},"M7227":{"lit":"անխոստովանանք","line":{"facs":"#z103957662","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103957662","n":"6"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-010a"},"n":"անխոստովանանք"},"V1108":{"lit":"անխոստովանանք","line":{"facs":"#z104423305","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104423305","n":"17"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9090"},"n":"անխոստովանանք"}}
